title: Workflow Configuration
selectProject: Select a project to configure its task workflow.
workflowGraphDesc: Read the persisted or draft workflow as a status graph and review its automation rules in the same place.
noTransitions: No transitions defined yet. Add a few status rules to visualize this workflow.
noTriggers: No automation triggers configured for this project.
statusTransitionsDesc: Define which status changes are allowed for tasks in this project.
automationTriggersDesc: When a task transitions between statuses, run an automated action.
recentActivityDesc: Latest trigger executions received from the realtime workflow event stream.
recordedLive: recorded in the live workflow feed.
recordedLast: captured from the last known workflow event feed.
noActivity: No workflow activity received yet for this project.

editor.importConfirmDiscard: Importing will replace the current workflow. Discard unsaved changes?
